old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.2","title":"Implement NVM failure (OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED) handling with SSN rollback or safe advance in oscore_protect_request","description":"After SSN increment, if oscore_ctx_persist_ssn returns OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED, either decrement sender_seq under mutex to rollback or advance SSN to a safe value (e.g. next power of 2 or max).
